title: centaurea × maritima nothosubsp. oblanceolata
intro: Centaurea × maritima nothosubsp. oblanceolata, also known as Centaurea × maritima nothosubsp. oblanceolata or 'Oblanceolate Seaboard Knapweed', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, specifically a hybrid of Centaurea maritima and Centaurea jacea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Centaurea × maritima nothosubsp. oblanceolata include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × maritima nothosubsp. oblanceolata can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
